questionHtml: The consumer price index for 2014 was 101.23. Calculate the rate of inflation between 2014 and 2015 (the base year).
markschemeHtml:
(100 − 101.23)/101.23 × 100 = −1.22 %

NB workings are not required.

−1.22 %

An answer of −1.22 % or −1.22 or deflation of 1.22 % is sufficient for [1].
